what: Compute mean ADT distance to each cell's k nearest neighbors — calc_adt_dists
title: Compute mean ADT distance to each cell's k nearest neighbors — calc_adt_dists
text: Calculates mean distance cell's ADT profile k nearest neighbors specified neighbor space (e.g. RNA, BCR, WNN) using chosen distance metric (mean absolute difference, Manhattan, Euclidean, cosine similarity).

title: Compute mean ADT distance to each cell's k nearest neighbors — calc_adt_dists
code: calc_adt_dists(   seurat_obj,   base_assay,   adt_assay = "ADT",   layer = "data",   features_adt = NULL,   k,   distance_metric = "mean_abs",   return_mean = TRUE,   exclude_self = TRUE )

title: Compute mean ADT distance to each cell's k nearest neighbors — calc_adt_dists
text: seurat_obj Seurat object contains neighbor slots. base_assay neighbor space use (e.g. "RNA", "BCR", "WNN"). adt_assay ADT assay name (e.g. "ADT", "ADTnorm"). layer Data layer pull (data, counts, scale.data). features_adt Optional vector ADT features; NULL, use features present. k Number nearest neighbors. distance_metric One c("mean_abs", "manhattan", "euclidean", "cosine"). return_mean TRUE, return mean across cells; else return per-cell values. exclude_self Drop cell neighbor list present.

title: Compute mean ADT distance to each cell's k nearest neighbors — calc_adt_dists
text: single numeric value return_mean = TRUE, named numeric vector per-cell distances return_mean = FALSE.

title: Compute mean ADT distance to each cell's k nearest neighbors — calc_adt_dists
text: Euclidean distance measures straight-line distance vectors. Manhattan distance sums absolute differences across features. Mean absolute difference per-feature mean absolute differences. Cosine similarity measures cosine angle two vectors, values closer 1 indicating greater similarity.

what: Calculate Moran's i for a Seurat object — calc_adt_moran
title: Calculate Moran's i for a Seurat object — calc_adt_moran
text: Calculates global Moran's index ADT feature given neighbor graph.

title: Calculate Moran's i for a Seurat object — calc_adt_moran
code: calc_adt_moran(   seurat_obj,   features_adt,   adt_assay = "ADT",   graph_name,   row_standardize = TRUE )

title: Calculate Moran's i for a Seurat object — calc_adt_moran
